blocks.text: More wins: **Bangladesh ICC → Sri Lanka (0.55) = +74.7 TW!** Venezuela → Delcy Rodríguez (the VP/constitutional successor, I had her at only 0.05) — lesson: weight constitutional successors higher for "interim/acting" questions.
